dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 100 Defense for each enemy you are engaged in battle with. (Max of 15 targets)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 200 Defense for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 200 Defense for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1% Defense for 10 seconds. (Max stack 5)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1% Defense for 10 seconds. (Max stack 5)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Tactical Daily (Greater)
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. You gain 5% Combat Advantage. (30 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Ruthless Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1.5% Critical Strike and Critical Severity for 15 seconds. Max 5 stacks: 7.5%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Shielded Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you have a Shield or Temp HP in Wildspace, gain 7.5% Critical Strike and 7.5% Critical Severity. In non-Wildspace, these bonuses are reduced to 3.8% Critical Strike and 3.8% Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Perfect Form
dbEquipBonuses.description: While your health is at Maximum, you gain a stack of Immaculate State per second. When not at Maximum health, you lose all stacks at once. Each stack grants +1.2% Combat Advantage. Maximum stacks: 5 (+6% Combat Advantage).

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% Defense for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Battle Reserves
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown) Additionally, when Battle Reserves triggers, you gain 5% Combat Advantage for 10s.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Battle Reserves
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown) Additionally, when Battle Reserves triggers, you gain 5% Combat Advantage for 10s.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Battle Reserves
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown) Additionally, when Battle Reserves triggers, you gain 5% Combat Advantage for 10s.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1% Power for 10 seconds. (Max stack 5)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Challenger's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, your Power is increased by 1500.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Challenger's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, your Power is increased by 1500.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Tenacity
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1% Critical Severity for 10 seconds. (Max stack 5)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Maiden's Blade
dbEquipBonuses.description: You do 5% more damage to enemies that are not facing you. This bonus doubles in the Underdark.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (10 second cooldown) Additionally, when Focused Daily triggers, you gain 2.5% Critical Severity for 10s.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Vital Equilibrium
dbEquipBonuses.description: While your health is above 50%, gain +5% Power. When your health is below 50%, your Incoming Healing is increased by +7%. Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1000 Defense for each player in your team.
